channel.title: Miles, Points and More
channel.description: Churning credit cards, chasing points, and flying in seats I could never actually afford. US + Australia.

item.title: Deal Alert: 50,000 Qantas Points on the Amex Ultimate — Ends 28 July
item.description: Amex is dangling 50,000 bonus Qantas Points on the Ultimate Card — but the offer closes 28 July 2026. Here's whether it's worth grabbing.

item.title: What Is Really the Point of All of This?
item.description: Churning takes up a lot of time and mental energy. So why do it? Here's how I spent a lot of it.

item.title: Sign-up Bonus vs Using the Correct Card for Every Purchase
item.description: Yes - I'm going to tell you your Amex Gold or Amex Plat needs to be cancelled. Give this a read and decide.

item.title: What Should Your First Credit Card Be?
item.description: New to credit? Your first card should be the Discover Card - one of the easiest to get approved for.

item.title: What Card Should You Apply for Next?
item.description: I get this question all the time. If you've got a 700+ score and a couple of cards, here's the exact order I'd apply — a full 5-year plan.

item.title: Best High-Interest Savings Account in Australia (March 2023)
item.description: So many savings accounts, so little clarity. My take on BOQ, ING, Macquarie and the rest — and the one I'd actually pick.

item.title: How to Not Pay Interest on Your Credit Card
item.description: Carrying a balance and paying interest every month? Stop making the banks easy money. Four ways to pause or kill the interest without hurting your score.

item.title: Revolut vs Wise (TransferWise)
item.description: Which is actually cheaper for international transfers? I ran the same $10,000 through both. The gap surprised me.

item.title: UBank $30 for Signing Up — Use 7JKDWG6
item.description: Free $30 from UBank for making three card purchases in 30 days. Use code 7JKDWG6. Easy money.

item.title: All the Stupid Rules in This Game
item.description: There are way too many rules to look out for when churning. Here's the cheat sheet for every major issuer so you don't get denied.

item.title: List of My Credit Cards with Annual Fees
item.description: The annual-fee cards I actually keep, and exactly why each one earns its keep — free nights, travel protections, return protection.
